description: Use this API to return an array of real values for the voltage droop controls. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.3.0. ierr, iarray = avoltagedroopint(string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the voltage droop quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: iarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

string.description: defined regulated bus of voltage droop control.
actual regulated bus of voltage droop control.
